# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the main branch is actively maintained for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Main    | :white_check_mark: |
| Older   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this repository, please do NOT open a public issue. Instead, please report it via private email or direct communication with the repository owner.

Upon receiving your report, the owner will review the issue and, if valid, work on a patch and coordinate a release. We appreciate your efforts in responsibly disclosing security vulnerabilities.
